leadText: Battery redirects here. For the held item, see Cell Battery. Battery (Japanese: バッテリー Battery) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Charjabug.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability increases the Special Attack of allies when they use special moves by approximately 30%, or more precisely, 5325/4096. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Battery has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability increases the Special Attack of allies when they use special moves by approximately 30%, or more precisely, 5325/4096.
